item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v1.0.1 -->
## What's Changed ### Other Changes * feat: add lock screen plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/46 * feat: add microphone mute plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/49 * feat: add fans control plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/47 * fix: align plugin market action buttons by @FaiChou in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/51 * fix: render installed plugin drag preview by @FaiChou in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/53 * feat: add fix damaged app plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/50 * Add Activity Bar plugin by @char1eslu in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/52
## New Contributors * @FaiChou made their first contribution in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/51
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/compare/v1.0.0...v1.0.1
